name: matched_alt_donor_identity_falsifier

arms.label: scratch_baseline
arms.description: No anchor; exact g165/g174 Part A scratch baseline protocol.

arms.label: anchor_qwen3_donor
arms.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to the original trained Qwen3-0.6B donor.

arms.label: anchor_alt_donor_seed_1234
arms.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to a same-architecture alternative donor trained from scratch on C4 with seed 1234; lambda is normalized per recipient seed to match Qwen3's initial anchor-gradient L2.

arms.label: anchor_alt_donor_seed_5678
arms.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to a same-architecture alternative donor trained from scratch on C4 with seed 5678; lambda is normalized per recipient seed to match Qwen3's initial anchor-gradient L2.

arms.label: anchor_alt_donor_seed_9999
arms.description: Constant Frobenius anchor to a same-architecture alternative donor trained from scratch on C4 with seed 9999; lambda is normalized per recipient seed to match Qwen3's initial anchor-gradient L2.

alternative_donors.overlap_filter: reject alt train/eval windows sharing any token 13-gram with recipient main train or eval windows

lambda_normalization.note: The squared-distance ratio requested by the adversarial note is recorded as lambda_f2_ratio_formula. Exact initial anchor-gradient matching for lambda*||theta-target||^2 requires the square-root ratio.

criteria.identity_specificity_locked: mean(qwen3_gain - best_alt_gain) >= +0.5 nats and paired 95% CI excludes zero
criteria.intermediate: mean margin in [+0.2, +0.5) nats with paired 95% CI excluding zero
criteria.identity_specificity_rejected: mean margin <= +0.2 nats, CI crosses zero, or matched-alt reaches >=80% of the +1.087 nats Qwen3 reference gain

main_g165_c4.protocol_note: Exact g165/g174 Part A C4 text loader and tokenizer block.

alternative_donor_heldout_c4.purpose: alternative donor held-out C4 stopping metric

dataset_eval.purpose: alternative donor held-out C4 stopping metric
alternative donor held-out C4 stopping metric

summary.verdict: FAIL: donor-identity specificity REJECTED. Best matched alt (anchor_alt_donor_seed_1234) gain=+1.048 nats (96.4% of +1.087 reference); Qwen3-minus-best-alt margin=+0.038 nats, 95% CI [+0.018, +0.068].

verdict: FAIL: donor-identity specificity REJECTED. Best matched alt (anchor_alt_donor_seed_1234) gain=+1.048 nats (96.4% of +1.087 reference); Qwen3-minus-best-alt margin=+0.038 nats, 95% CI [+0.018, +0.068].
